top.label: Top-level
top.title: Context
top.desc: Top-level view derived from Euroleague PlayByPlay + Points endpoints.
insights: Possession types are inferred, not native API fields.
This JSON is suitable both for Sankey rendering and later metrics expansion.
ALBA Berlin generated 0.74 points per possession over 93 tracked possessions.
Zalgiris Kaunas generated 0.70 points per possession over 88 tracked possessions.
